prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 华中农业大学在新疆理科2023年最低位次约5934名，2024年约6701名，2025年约6687名。近三年位次整体后移，2024年较2023年后移约767名，2025年与2024年基 本持平，基准位次约6687名；该校在新疆理科招生计划2023–2025年均为3人，2026年计划仍为3人，连续四年持平，无扩招或缩招，招生规模极小，对竞 争格局影响有限。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 华中农业大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年第45名，近年排名稳定在42–47名区间，属于全国中上游水平；该校在2021–2026年声誉监测中均无显著舆情事件，声誉平稳；抖音热度排名第54位（总106校），评价为"较热"，综合热度约56.4万，短视频曝光以毕业巡游、花车活动 为主，整体关注度中等偏上；第五轮学科评估中，兽医学A+、畜牧学A+、作物学A、水产A、食品科学与工程A，共5个A-/A/A+学科，农林特色鲜明，对相关专业 报考有一定吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 该校在新疆理科招生专业为植物保护（国家卓越农林人才计划）和公共管理类，均属农林/管理类方向，社会整体热度偏冷；新疆202 5年理科考生约5.25万人，2026年总考生约23.8万人（按历史理科占比68.6%估算约16.3万人），考生规模大幅增长，竞争显著加剧新疆理科本科一批2023年396分→ 2024年390分→2025年421分，2025年；华中农业大学位于湖北武汉，距新疆较远，跨省报考存在一定地域偏好影响；该校在新疆招生人数极少（仅3人 ），招生占比微乎其微。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次后移趋势、2026年招生计划持平、新疆考生总数大幅增长（竞争加剧）以及农林类专业社会热度偏冷等因素，在2025年基 准6687名基础上预计竞争略有加剧，位次小幅后移。预测最低位次约6767名，区间6267–7267名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: Huazhong Agricultural University's minimum ranking in Xinjiang Science was approximately 5934 in 2023, 6701 in 2024, and 6687 in 2025. Over the past three years, the ranking has shifted backward overall, with a shift of about 767 places from 2024 compared to 2023, and 2025 basically flat with 2024, with a baseline ranking of about 6687. The university's enrollment plan in Xinjiang Science was 3 students from 2023 to 2025, and the 2026 plan remains 3 students, unchanged for four consecutive years, with no expansion or reduction, and the enrollment scale is extremely small, having limited impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Huazhong Agricultural University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranks 45th, with a stable ranking in the 42–47 range in recent years, placing it at the upper-middle level nationally. The university has had no significant public opinion incidents in reputation monitoring from 2021 to 2026, maintaining a stable reputation. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 54th (out of 106 schools), rated as 'relatively hot', with a comprehensive popularity of about 564,000. Short video exposure mainly features graduation parades and float activities, with overall attention at a medium-to-high level. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Veterinary Medicine received A+, Animal Science A+, Crop Science A, Aquaculture A, and Food Science and Engineering A, totaling 5 A-/A/A+ disciplines, with distinctive agricultural and forestry characteristics, which have some appeal for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The university's majors in Xinjiang Science are Plant Protection (National Excellent Agricultural and Forestry Talent Program) and Public Administration, both in the agriculture/forestry/management direction, with overall social popularity being relatively cold. In 2025, there were approximately 52,500 science examinees in Xinjiang, and in 2026, the total number of examinees is about 238,000 (estimated at about 163,000 based on the historical science proportion of 68.6%), with a significant increase in examinee numbers, leading to intensified competition. The first batch of science undergraduate programs in Xinjiang saw scores of 396 in 2023, 390 in 2024, and 421 in 2025. Huazhong Agricultural University is located in Wuhan, Hubei, far from Xinjiang, and cross-province applications are subject to certain regional preference effects. The university enrolls very few students in Xinjiang (only 3), with a negligible enrollment proportion.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the historical trend of ranking decline, the unchanged 2026 enrollment plan, the significant increase in the total number of examinees in Xinjiang (intensified competition), and the relatively cold social popularity of agriculture and forestry majors, competition is expected to slightly intensify based on the 2025 baseline of 6687, with a slight further decline in ranking. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 6767, with a range of 6267–7267.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Huazhong Agricultural University only recruits 2 majors with a total of 3 students in Xinjiang Science, with very limited slots. If your ranking falls within the predicted range of 6267–7267, it is recommended to use Tier 2 Public Administration as a safety option, and Tier 1 Plant Protection as a reach. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 6267), you can focus on reaching for the Plant Protection major. Due to the extremely small number of recruits, the application uncertainty is high, so it is advisable to prepare other university choices simultaneously.
